incorrects.description: Student clicked a wrong category on picture graph, first attempt

steps.text: Check the key. How many symbols show 50?

incorrects.description: Student clicked a wrong category on picture graph, second attempt

params.description: Birds column highlights on picture graph.

steps.text: The key says each symbol equals 10. Count the Birds column: 5 symbols. How much is that?

incorrects.description: Student clicked a wrong category on picture graph three or more times. System models the answer.

params.description: Birds column highlights on picture graph.

steps.text: Let me show you. The key tells us each symbol equals 10. I count the Birds column: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 symbols. That's 5 times 10, which equals 50. Birds shows 50.

incorrects.description: Student clicked a wrong category on bar graph, first attempt

steps.text: Look at the heights. Which bar reaches 50?

incorrects.description: Student clicked a wrong category on bar graph, second attempt

params.description: Birds bar highlights on bar graph.

steps.text: The axis shows 0, 10, 20, 30, 40, 50, 60. Follow the Birds bar up to the top. What number does it reach?

incorrects.description: Student clicked a wrong category on bar graph three or more times. System models the answer.

params.description: Birds bar highlights on bar graph.

steps.text: Here's how to read bar graphs. I look at the vertical axis: 0, 10, 20, 30, 40, 50, 60. Then I follow the Birds bar to its top. It stops at 50. That's how bar graphs show the count. Birds has 50.
